home.title: Dungeon Sweep
home.subtitle: One board, one life. Numbers show the total strength of monsters nearby. Level up, then wake the dragon.

chick.name: Peep
chick.trait: A tiny snack of XP. Every dungeon's welcome committee.

mousey.name: Mousey
mousey.trait: Always scurrying beside the Mouse King.

cuddle.name: Cuddlekin
cuddle.trait: Never alone — its partner is always in a tile right next to it.

pudding.name: Pudding
pudding.trait: The Sage's drop reveals every pudding on the board.

mimic.name: Boxer
mimic.trait: Looks like a lovely present. Poke it twice to call its bluff.

noodle.name: Noodle
noodle.trait: A polite snake. Hits for exactly what it says.

moobo.name: Moobo
moobo.trait: Big, honest, four damage of pure beef.

jellyking.name: Jubjub
jellyking.trait: Five of them huddle around the Sage at the board's edge.

nightowl.name: Night Owl
nightowl.trait: Roosts in a corner. Defeating it defuses every bomb on the board.

mouseking.name: Mouse King
mouseking.trait: Four mouseys always orbit it. Its crown reveals them all.

peeper.name: Peeper
peeper.trait: Its gaze turns nearby numbers into ?. Defeat it to see again.

sage.name: Sage
sage.trait: Waits at the edge, guarded by Jubjubs. Drops a pudding-finder.

boom.name: Bombom
boom.trait: Can't be fought until the Night Owl's sweep defuses it.

gnome.name: Snickerdoo
gnome.trait: Hops away every time you poke it. Corner it for a big XP prize.

dragon.name: The Dragon
dragon.trait: Sleeps at the very center. Slay it to win. Level up first!

tut.s1: Welcome! Tap any dark tile to flip it over.
tut.s2: Numbers = total strength of monsters in the 8 tiles around them. Big number, big neighbor.
tut.s3: Tap a revealed monster to fight it: lose HP equal to its strength, gain the same XP. Reaching exactly 0 HP is safe!
tut.s4: Level-ups fully heal you and add a heart. Grow strong, then wake the 🐉 in the center. 💗 scrolls heal when you tap them.

float.mineLocked: Too dangerous — defeat the Night Owl first
